{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Fisherman
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Fisherman]] is a known [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Fisherman]] is followed by the [[Fishers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
